description: LATERAL subquery with COUNT aggregation joined implicitly in FROM clause
name: lateral_subquery_basic
query_sql:
-- @name GetUsersWithOrderCount
-- @returns :many
SELECT u.id, u.name, o.order_count FROM users u, LATERAL (SELECT COUNT(*) AS order_count FROM orders WHERE user_id = u.id) AS o
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE orders (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id), total INTEGER NOT NULL);
